result.evidence_summary: No evidence of the 'Ifrane Nordic Festival' cross-country ski race was found in the search results. Mentions of Ifrane refer only to it as a ski resort town or a stop on general Morocco tours, with no references to any organized Nordic ski race, results, news, official sites, social media, videos, or listings in Worldloppet/FIS. The absence of concrete evidence across all requested categories confirms it does not exist as a real event.
